ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case count */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on the given date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the region */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., Recovered, Deceased) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of hospital admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of hospital discharge */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., case data, report, prediction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting data (e.g., surveys, active surveillance) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the intervention on case counts */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Implementation status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, situational) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source (e.g., case data, demographic data) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates from the source (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., case data, demographic data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
